global_context.scene_description: A photorealistic close-up of a hand holding a smartphone in a Phoenix home, with the phone screen as the focal point of the frame. The phone screen shows the iOS Recents call log — a vertical list of recent outbound calls. Each entry is an HVAC company name with a status note beside it: 'Desert Air HVAC — BUSY', 'Cool Choice — NO ANSWER', 'AZ Climate Pros — BOOKED 3 DAYS', 'Phoenix Heating Co. — VOICEMAIL', 'Valley HVAC — BUSY', 'Sun State Cooling — NO ANSWER'. All entries from today's date. The screen is bright, slightly glaring. The hand holding the phone is a man's hand, slightly tense, gripping the phone. Background is softly out of focus — a hot Phoenix interior, a window with bright overexposed daylight visible. Sweat on the brow visible at the top edge of the frame. Mood: panic call log, summer emergency, phone tag with every shop in town. Photorealistic, shot on 50mm lens.

composition.framing: close-up on phone screen, screen fills 60% of frame
composition.focal_point: the call log with all the BUSY/NO ANSWER/BOOKED labels

objects.label: smartphone screen showing call log
objects.text_content: Desert Air HVAC — BUSY | Cool Choice — NO ANSWER | AZ Climate Pros — BOOKED 3 DAYS | Phoenix Heating Co. — VOICEMAIL | Valley HVAC — BUSY | Sun State Cooling — NO ANSWER
micro_details: iOS-style Recents view with call icons
each row shows a generic HVAC company name and a status label in red or grey
today's date and times next to each entry
